examples: But the cosmodrome is just a start for Russia's new space ambitions.
Up to 30,000 specialists could be brought in to build the new cosmodrome.
GOCE is scheduled to launch on 16 March from the Plesetsk Cosmodrome in Northern Russia.
They will head to Kazakhstan's Baikonur Cosmodrome aboard a Soyuz TMA-17 capsule on 1 June.
The next Progress launch is scheduled for Jan. 26 from Russia's Baikonur Cosmodrome in Kazakhstan.
